# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

Prevent message queue security.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Shared event queue with secure access policy

Parameters:
  AllowedAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: The AWS Account ID allowed to send and receive messages
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS Account ID

  AllowedOrgId:
    Type: String
    Description: The AWS Organization ID for conditional access
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  HasOrgId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref AllowedOrgId, '']]

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: shared-event-queue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false

  SharedEventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendMessageFromTrustedAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AllowedAccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition: !If
              - HasOrgId
              - StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref AllowedOrgId
              - StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
          - Sid: AllowReceiveMessageFromTrustedAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AllowedAccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition: !If
              - HasOrgId
              - StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref AllowedOrgId
              - StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyUnauthorizedAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountId

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the shared event queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared event queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
